sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: M&T Bank Corp Cuts Stock Position in The Walt Disney Company $DIS

feed.title: Teradyne Inc. stock (US8807701029): Why its semiconductor testing leadership matters more now for in
feed.summary: Teradyne Inc. is a critical player in the semiconductor industry, providing automated test equipment essential for AI, automotive, and mobile chip production. The company's leadership in precision testing, diversified business segments, and strong financial performance make it an attractive long-term investment. Despite competition, Teradyne's innovation and exposure to secular trends like AI chip demand and automotive electrification position it well for future growth in the chip-dependent future.

feed.title: Caterpillar Stock: The 43x P/E Data Center Trap (NYSE:CAT)
feed.summary: Caterpillar's operating margins contracted in 2025 despite revenue growth, which the author suggests could signal a peak-cycle. The company returned more cash to shareholders than it generated in free cash flow, funding buybacks. With a high trailing P/E of 43.0x, the author believes the stock is overvalued and predicts a significant downside to a fair value near $350 based on mean-reversion models.

feed.title: Axon Enterprise Inc. stock (US05464C1018): Why Google Discover changes matter more now
feed.summary: Google's 2026 Discover Core Update significantly changes how investors access information on stocks like Axon Enterprise Inc. (AXON), prioritizing personalized, mobile-first content based on user activity. This shift delivers tailored insights on public safety tech trends directly to Google app feeds, enabling faster decision-making for retail investors. The update emphasizes high-quality, E-E-A-T content, making Axon's hardware and SaaS business model more discoverable and amplifying its visibility in a growing market.

feed.title: Coca-Cola, Colgate-Palmolive, and PepsiCo: Dividend Growth Stocks for 2026 - News and Statistics
feed.summary: This article highlights Coca-Cola, Colgate-Palmolive, and PepsiCo as strong dividend growth stocks for 2026, emphasizing their status as "Dividend Kings" due to decades of consistent dividend increases. Coca-Cola boasts 64 years of dividend growth with projected 7% annual earnings growth, while Colgate-Palmolive has a 63-year streak and a strong brand portfolio. PepsiCo is also noted for its brand recognition and global scale, positioning it for continued dividend delivery.

feed.title: Northern Trust Corp. stock (US6658591044): Why Google Discover changes matter more now
feed.summary: Google's 2026 Discover Core Update is significantly changing how investors receive news about Northern Trust Corp. stock (US6658591044) on mobile devices.
